description: Type and Authority determination rules for Energy Blueprint chart calculation

typeRules.description: Applied in order. First match wins.

conditions: There exists a continuous channel path from any motor center to the Throat center
No continuous channel path from any motor center to the Throat center
There exists a continuous channel path from any motor center to the Throat center
No continuous channel path from any motor center to the Throat center
At least one center is defined

authorityRules.description: Applied in hierarchy order. First defined center match wins.

hierarchy.description: Emotional wave must ride its full cycle before clarity. Never make decisions in the high or low of the wave.

hierarchy.condition: Sacral center is defined AND Solar Plexus is NOT defined
hierarchy.description: Gut response in the moment. The sacral responds with sounds and felt sense — yes or no.

hierarchy.condition: Spleen center is defined AND Sacral and Solar Plexus are NOT defined
hierarchy.description: Instantaneous knowing. The spleen speaks once, quietly, in the present moment. Trust the first hit.

hierarchy.condition: Heart center is defined AND Sacral, Solar Plexus, and Spleen are NOT defined
hierarchy.description: Willpower and commitment. If the will is truly engaged — not forced — the direction is correct.

hierarchy.condition: G Center is defined (connects to Throat) AND no lower authorities apply
hierarchy.description: Identity speaks through the voice. Talk it through with trusted others and listen to what you say.

hierarchy.condition: Only Head and/or Ajna are defined AND no lower authorities apply
hierarchy.description: No inner authority. Decisions are best made by being in the right environment and bouncing ideas off others.
Wait through a full lunar cycle (28.5 days) before major decisions. The Moon's transit through all 64 gates gives temporary definition to sample.

profileCombinations.description: Profile = Personality Sun Line / Design Sun Line. 12 possible combinations.

2/4.name: Hermit / Opportunist
2/4.theme: Natural talent called out through relationships

2/5.name: Hermit / Heretic
2/5.theme: Natural talent projected upon and universalized

3/5.name: Martyr / Heretic
3/5.theme: Trial and error generating practical wisdom for others

3/6.name: Martyr / Role Model
3/6.theme: Discovery through experience becoming lived wisdom

4/6.name: Opportunist / Role Model
4/6.theme: Influence through network becoming living example

4/1.name: Opportunist / Investigator
4/1.theme: Fixed fate through relationships and deep study

5/1.name: Heretic / Investigator
5/1.theme: Practical solutions grounded in deep research

6/2.name: Role Model / Hermit
6/2.theme: Three-part life process — trial, retreat, embodiment

6/3.name: Role Model / Martyr
6/3.theme: Wisdom through lived experience across three life phases

definitionTypes.description: How defined centers are connected to each other

types.Single: All defined centers connected through channels — one continuous group
types.Split: Defined centers form exactly two separate groups
types.TripleSplit: Defined centers form three separate groups
types.QuadrupleSplit: Defined centers form four separate groups
